description_of_loss: On 03/23/2025, a fire originating at 2700 University Avenue, Minneapolis, MN 55414, owned or operated by Keystone Cleaning Co., spread to our insured's adjacent property at 1800 N. Highland Avenue, Los Angeles, CA 90028. The Los Angeles Fire Department responded and confirmed the fire originated at your client's property. The fire department report (Incident No. FD-2025-99499) indicates the cause was an unattended cooking fire.
